# Risk Register: {project_name}

**Date:** {date}
**Feature / Release:** {feature}

## Risk matrix scoring

- **Score = Likelihood × Impact** (1–25)
- **15–25:** 🔴 Red — must mitigate immediately
- **8–14:** 🟡 Amber — plan mitigation
- **1–7:** 🟢 Green — monitor only

See `references/risk-matrix-scoring.md` for the full matrix.

## Risks

<!-- RISK entries below. Each block is self-contained; do not
     renumber on close. Append new risks to the bottom. -->

### RISK-NN: <short title>

**Category:** Technical / Schedule / Resource / Budget / Scope / External / Other
**Likelihood:** N/5 (Rare / Unlikely / Possible / Likely / Almost certain)
**Impact:** N/5 (Negligible / Minor / Moderate / Major / Critical)
**Score:** NN (Red / Amber / Green)
**Description:** <what could go wrong, and under what conditions>
**Mitigation:** <what the team will do to reduce likelihood or impact>
**Contingency:** <backup plan if the risk occurs>
**Owner:** <name / role>
**Status:** Active / Mitigated / Closed
**Last updated:** YYYY-MM-DD
